name: Day 10 — Review Aggregator + AI Sentiment Dashboard

nodes.name: 📡 Fetch Google Reviews

oAuth2Api.name: Google Business OAuth2 — replace with your credential

nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a Google OAuth2 credential in n8n with Google My Business API scope. Replace YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID and YOUR_LOCATION_ID with values from Google Business Profile dashboard.

nodes.name: 📡 Fetch Trustpilot Reviews
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get your Trustpilot API key from https://developers.trustpilot.com. Find YOUR_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID in your Trustpilot business account settings.

openAiApi.name: OpenAI API — add your key in n8n credentials

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Google Sheets

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets OAuth2 — add your credential

nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a Google Sheet named 'Reviews' with these column headers in row 1: Source, Reviewer, Rating, Review Text, Review Date, Sentiment, Score (1-10), Key Theme, Emotion, Needs Reply, Urgency, Summary, Has Reply, Processed At

_readme.title: Day 10 — Review Aggregator + AI Sentiment Dashboard
_readme.description: Fetches reviews from Google Business Profile and Trustpilot every morning, runs AI sentiment analysis on each one, logs everything to a Google Sheets dashboard, and fires an instant Slack alert for every negative review.
nodes_summary: Schedule Trigger — runs daily at 9 AM
HTTP Request (×2) — fetches from Google Business Profile API + Trustpilot API
Code (×2) — normalizes both sources into a unified review schema
Merge — combines Google + Trustpilot reviews into one stream
SplitInBatches — processes one review at a time
OpenAI gpt-4o-mini — sentiment, score, theme, emotion, urgency, summary
Code — safely parses AI JSON with error fallback
Google Sheets — appends 14-column row per review
IF — routes Negative reviews to Slack alert
Slack — sends rich negative-review alert with action status
NoOp — silent pass for Positive/Neutral reviews
credentials_needed: Google Business Profile OAuth2 (Google My Business API scope)
setup_steps: 1. Replace YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID and YOUR_LOCATION_ID in the Google Reviews node
2. Replace YOUR_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID and YOUR_TRUSTPILOT_API_KEY in the Trustpilot node
3. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in the Google Sheets node
4. Create a Google Sheet tab named 'Reviews' with 14 column headers (listed in node notes)
5. Replace YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID in the Slack node
6. Add all credentials in n8n Settings → Credentials

gig_value.bundle_opportunity: Combine with Day 9 (cold email) for full reputation + outreach package
